item.title: Best Self-Hosted Email Server 2026: Stalwart vs Mailcow vs Mailu (Docker Setup)
item.description: Compare the top self-hosted email server solutions in 2026: Stalwart Mail Server, Mailcow, and Mailu. Complete Docker compose setups, feature comparison, and deployment guides for running your own email server.
